TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lalengatan no Pisafaol == Papiladomen ni mama ko malakakaay a fa'inayan Itiya ho ira ko cecay a mararamoday ca Lona Awaw aci Topalocong hananay,misafaloco' to sakasalisin no niyaro' to sapisamihecaan a lisin, so'elinay saciwawa sato cangra a mararamod ira ci Mayaw Kakalawan ko kaka, sacisafa saan ci Onak Kakalawan tatosa a malikaka, mahatatosa o fa'inayan. Safaloco' sato ko mama nangra a malikaka, "mikilang ho kita a maramamama" han no mama somowal koya malikakaay. So'elinay lowad sato a misakilang cangra i lotok no Falaaway. Yo misakilang ci mama, papiladomen ni mama ca Mayaw aci Onak a malikaka,yaan sato malikakaay "mafokil kami mama to lalan a miladom" han nona wawa, o mama sato "ano matira aca, tolikawen ho ako ko lalan namo" han to no mama. Oya mifariwan no mama a lalan .sapikepiked sanay, tama han no mama ko mara'ayay a mipalalan,yo tangasa i piladoman a sa'owac, maherek sato itira a mifariw a mipalalan, sowal sato ci mama:"oriri to ladomen to" han to ni mama ko wawa nira a tatosa. "hayi" sato koya malikakaay. Tahirahira i piladoman i, 'araw han mangota koya nanom, oya sato a malikakaay, "imatini sato i,mangota aca kinian a namom, a maamaanen no mita ko nipiladom" sato. Mafiyor a mangota ko nanom O cofay(patiko) to nangra tayra ci mamaan, "icowa ko nanom" han to ni mama nangra, sowal sato koya malikakaay, "tahira han niyam itira i, mafinor koya piladoman, mangota ko nanom, orasaka caay kami pihacol mama" han to no wawa, ci mama sato nangra saowal saan: " ano matira aca katayra ho miliyaw a miladom, tingalaw to kiya" han to no mama. Miliyaw heca a patiko koya wawa a tatosa a miladom, tahira han nangra, matiya to a mangota kaiya nanom, micofay heca kiyan a malikakaay,tahira saan i pisakilangan " ira " han ni mama nagra a mitala, " nawi, matiya to mama a mafinor, o cayay kami kapiladom" han to no wawa ko sowal ci mamaan. Ya sato mama ci Topalocong itira to a mayoyang to," ano matira aca a mafinor,o iraay ko mikari'angay i fafa'ed kiya, o hada demaken aca namo a malikaka, kasihawan ato 'idoc a miladom, tahira han namo ano mafinor heca, kamo to i,dipdip han a pasifafaw ma'araw namo koya a mingotaay haw, ano o maan to kira a mari'angay, ano ira a ma'araw namo itira,aka pisamata ka o recafi' namo a mipatay, tangsol han a militangal haw" han to no mama."hayi" sato koya tatosaay a wawa. Patayen koya mingotaay tangsol litangalen han no mama Tatoy sato koya malikakaay to hawan ato 'idoc a lomowad a miladom. So'elinay tahira han to itira i sa'owac, sa matiya to a mangota, dipdip(hokhok) sato koya a malikakaay pasifafaw, so'elinay tangasa i safafaw koya a malikakaay mafinor to ko nanom. Iniaan aca koya mifinoray to nanom a tamdaw,"inian a tamdaw ko mingotaay" sato a mayoyang koya a malikakaay,tangsol han to nangra a micocok ato milofot, maherek sato a militangal koya a malikakaay tiri'en to nangra koya a tangal, " ci mama ita kini " macekok, ono mita a mama a tangal, nengneng han ko pising so'elinay ci mama ita kini sato cangra. Taraana to i pisakilangan sato koya malikakakaay i, so'elinay malaheci away itira ci mama nangra, o ci mama heca nangra kinian a malofotay o tangic to niya malikakaay," patay han nomita ci mama ita" ,sato cangra.hinam han i,ci mama taca nangra ko mingotaay tinian a nanom, sapisafa'naaw ni mama nangra to wawa, nona o mangalayay to aca to sakapatayaw kinian a mama. Tatoy han to noya malikakaay koya tangal a minokay. Tangasa sato i loma', " citafad kami ina" han to noya malikakaay ci ina nangra, " hamay pa'arawi kako" han to no ina, pa'araw sa o paci'eng, "caay, ka o pising ko pa'arawen" han to no ina.Pa'araaraw sa o kakotong no laway, "caay, ka o pising" han to no ina. Pa'araaraw sa o pilofotan, mayoyang to ko ina," ka o pising" ha kiya kiso, so'elinay pa'araw hanto to pising, iyaan sato o ina "ci mama namo kiraan" sato a mayoyang ato mangic a misaheto(tada o tangic to ni ina), " ano matira aca kamo, o pa'acaay ko nika saanan namo ci mamaan namo, ka o nikangayaw" (militnagl to sapatodong to mama) han to no ina a mayoyang, so'elinay o satokol (misaliway to sakakahemaw no tatirengan) to nangra a malikaka masaromi'ami'ad a mafakac(comikay) ato ma'efer. Papilitangalen no ina to sapatodong to mama Ma'edeng to kini sato cangra a malikaka, o lowad to nangra a mi'adop to ngafor, so'elinay midepdep to cangra kiaan ngafor, malepel to nangrankiyaan ngafor, alaen to nangra ko remes ato do'es a paini ci inaan nangra, sowal sato ci ina nangra, "caay hen kini ka o matatodongay kinian a ngafor, tiyola hen a mi'adop" han to ni ina. === Pacefaday tilid ===
S.PHON: == ɾaɾəŋatan no~u pisafao~uɾ == papiɾaɬ~ɮo~umən ni mama ko~u maɾakakaaj a faʡinajan itija ħo~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ʦa ɾo~una awaw aʦi to~upaɾo~uʦo~uŋ ħananaj,misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sakasaɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u sapisamiħəʦaan a ɾisin, so~uʡəɾinaj saʦiwawa sato~u ʦaŋra a mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ira ʦi majaw kakaɾawan ko~u kaka, saʦisafa saan ʦi o~unak kakaɾawan tato~usa a maɾikaka, maħatato~usa o~u faʡinajan. safaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sato~u ko~u mama naŋra a maɾikaka, "mikiɾaŋ ħo~u kita a maramamama" ħan no~u mama so~umo~uwaɾ ko~uja maɾikakaaj. so~uʡəɾinaj ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ sato~u a misakiɾaŋ ʦaŋra i ɾo~uto~uk no~u faɾaawaj. jo~u misakiɾaŋ ʦi mama, papiɾaɬ~ɮo~umən ni mama ʦa majaw aʦi o~unak a maɾikaka,jaan sato~u maɾikakaaj "mafo~ukiɾ kami mama to~u ɾaɾan a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um" ħan no~una wawa, o~u mama sato~u "ano~u matira aʦa, to~uɾikawən ħo~u ako~u ko~u ɾaɾan namo~u" ħan to~u no~u mama. o~uja mifariwan no~u mama a ɾaɾan .sapikəpikəɬ~ɮ sanaj, tama ħan no~u mama ko~u maraʡajaj a mipaɾaɾan,jo~u taŋasa i piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman a saʡo~uwaʦ, maħərək sato~u itira a mifariw a mipaɾaɾan, so~uwaɾ sato~u ʦi mama:"o~uriri to~u ɾaɬ~ɮo~umən to~u" ħan to~u ni mama ko~u wawa nira a tato~usa. "ħaji" sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj. taħiraħira i piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman i, ʡaraw ħan maŋo~uta ko~uja nano~um, o~uja sato~u a maɾikakaaj, "imatini sato~u i,maŋo~uta aʦa kinian a namo~um, a maamaanən no~u mita ko~u nipiɾaɬ~ɮo~um" sato~u. mafijo~ur a maŋo~uta ko~u nano~um o~u ʦo~ufaj(patiko~u) to~u naŋra tajra ʦi mamaan, "iʦo~uwa ko~u nano~um" ħan to~u ni mama naŋra, so~uwaɾ sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj, "taħira ħan nijam itira i, mafino~ur ko~uja piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman, maŋo~uta ko~u nano~um, o~urasaka ʦaaj kami piħaʦo~uɾ mama" ħan to~u no~u wawa, ʦi mama sato~u naŋra sao~uwaɾ saan: " ano~u matira aʦa katajra ħo~u miɾijaw a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, tiŋaɾaw to~u kija" ħan to~u no~u mama. miɾijaw ħəʦa a patiko~u ko~uja wawa a tato~usa a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, taħira ħan naŋra, matija to~u a maŋo~uta kaija nano~um, miʦo~ufaj ħəʦa kijan a maɾikakaaj,taħira saan i pisakiɾaŋan " ira " ħan ni mama na*ra a mitaɾa, " nawi, matija to~u mama a mafino~ur, o~u ʦajaj kami kapiɾaɬ~ɮo~um" ħan to~u no~u wawa ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦi mamaan. ja sato~u mama ʦi to~upaɾo~uʦo~uŋ itira to~u a majo~ujaŋ to~u," ano~u matira aʦa a mafino~ur,o~u iraaj ko~u mikariʡaŋaj i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ kija, o~u ħaɬ~ɮa ɬ~ɮəmakən aʦa namo~u a maɾikaka, kasiħawan ato~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, taħira ħan namo~u ano~u mafino~ur ħəʦa, kamo~u to~u i,ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮip ħan a pasifafaw maʡaraw namo~u ko~uja a miŋo~utaaj ħaw, ano~u o~u maan to~u kira a mariʡaŋaj, ano~u ira a maʡaraw namo~u itira,aka pisamata ka o~u rəʦafiʡ namo~u a mipataj, taŋso~uɾ ħan a miɾitaŋaɾ ħaw" ħan to~u no~u mama."ħaji" sato~u ko~uja tato~usaaj a wawa. patajən ko~uja miŋo~utaaj taŋso~uɾ ɾitaŋaɾən ħan no~u mama tato~uj sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj to~u ħawan ato~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um. so~uʡəɾinaj taħira ħan to~u itira i saʡo~uwaʦ, sa matija to~u a maŋo~uta, ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮip(ħo~ukħo~uk) sato~u ko~uja a maɾikakaaj pasifafaw, so~uʡəɾinaj taŋasa i safafaw ko~uja a maɾikakaaj mafino~ur to~u ko~u nano~um. iniaan aʦa ko~uja mifino~uraj to~u nano~um a tamɬ~ɮaw,"inian a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miŋo~utaaj" sato~u a majo~ujaŋ ko~uja a maɾikakaaj,taŋso~uɾ ħan to~u naŋra a miʦo~uʦo~uk ato~u miɾo~ufo~ut, maħərək sato~u a miɾitaŋaɾ ko~uja a maɾikakaaj tiriʡən to~u naŋra ko~uja a taŋaɾ, " ʦi mama ita kini " maʦəko~uk, o~uno~u mita a mama a taŋaɾ, nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u pisiŋ so~uʡəɾinaj ʦi mama ita kini sato~u ʦaŋra. taraana to~u i pisakiɾaŋan sato~u ko~uja maɾikakakaaj i, so~uʡəɾinaj maɾaħəʦi awaj itira ʦi mama naŋra, o~u ʦi mama ħəʦa naŋra kinian a maɾo~ufo~utaj o~u taŋiʦ to~u nija maɾikakaaj," pataj ħan no~umita ʦi mama ita" ,sato~u ʦaŋra.ħinam ħan i,ʦi mama taʦa naŋra ko~u miŋo~utaaj tinian a nano~um, sapisafaʡnaaw ni mama naŋra to~u wawa, no~una o~u maŋaɾajaj to~u aʦa to~u sakapatajaw kinian a mama. tato~uj ħan to~u no~uja maɾikakaaj ko~uja taŋaɾ a mino~ukaj. taŋasa sato~u i ɾo~umaʡ, " ʦitafaɬ~ɮ kami ina" ħan to~u no~uja maɾikakaaj ʦi ina naŋra, " ħamaj paʡarawi kako~u" ħan to~u no~u ina, paʡaraw sa o~u paʦiʡəŋ, "ʦaaj, ka o~u pisiŋ ko~u paʡarawən" ħan to~u no~u ina.paʡaraaraw sa o~u kako~uto~uŋ no~u ɾawaj, "ʦaaj, ka o~u pisiŋ" ħan to~u no~u ina. paʡaraaraw sa o~u piɾo~ufo~utan, majo~ujaŋ to~u ko~u ina," ka o~u pisiŋ" ħa kija kiso~u, so~uʡəɾinaj paʡaraw ħanto~u to~u pisiŋ, ijaan sato~u o~u ina "ʦi mama namo~u kiraan" sato~u a majo~ujaŋ ato~u maŋiʦ a misaħəto~u(taɬ~ɮa o~u taŋiʦ to~u ni ina), " ano~u matira aʦa kamo~u, o~u paʡaʦaaj ko~u nika saanan namo~u ʦi mamaan namo~u, ka o~u nikaŋajaw" (miɾitna*ɾ to~u sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u mama) ħan to~u no~u ina a majo~ujaŋ, so~uʡəɾinaj o~u sato~uko~uɾ (misaɾiwaj to~u sakakaħəmaw no~u tatirəŋan) to~u naŋra a maɾikaka masaro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ a mafakaʦ(ʦo~umikaj) ato~u maʡəfər. papiɾitaŋaɾən no~u ina to~u sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u mama maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ to~u kini sato~u ʦaŋra a maɾikaka, o~u ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u naŋra a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up to~u ŋafo~ur, so~uʡəɾinaj miɬ~ɮəpɬ~ɮəp to~u ʦaŋra kiaan ŋafo~ur, maɾəpəɾ to~u naŋrankijaan ŋafo~ur, aɾaən to~u naŋra ko~u rəməs ato~u ɬ~ɮo~uʡəs a paini ʦi inaan naŋra, so~uwaɾ sato~u ʦi ina naŋra, "ʦaaj ħən kini ka o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kinian a ŋafo~ur, tijo~uɾa ħən a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up" ħan to~u ni ina. === paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ ===
S.FORM: == Lalengatan no Pisafaol == Papiladomen ni mama ko malakakaay a fa'inayan Itiya ho ira ko cecay a mararamoday ca Lona Awaw aci Topalocong hananay,misafaloco' to sakasalisin no niyaro' to sapisamihecaan a lisin, so'elinay saciwawa sato cangra a mararamod ira ci Mayaw Kakalawan ko kaka, sacisafa saan ci Onak Kakalawan tatosa a malikaka, mahatatosa o fa'inayan. Safaloco' sato ko mama nangra a malikaka, "mikilang ho kita a maramamama" han no mama somowal koya malikakaay. So'elinay lowad sato a misakilang cangra i lotok no Falaaway. Yo misakilang ci mama, papiladomen ni mama ca Mayaw aci Onak a malikaka,yaan sato malikakaay "mafokil kami mama to lalan a miladom" han nona wawa, o mama sato "ano matira aca, tolikawen ho ako ko lalan namo" han to no mama. Oya mifariwan no mama a lalan .sapikepiked sanay, tama han no mama ko mara'ayay a mipalalan,yo tangasa i piladoman a sa'owac, maherek sato itira a mifariw a mipalalan, sowal sato ci mama:"oriri to ladomen to" han to ni mama ko wawa nira a tatosa. "hayi" sato koya malikakaay. Tahirahira i piladoman i, 'araw han mangota koya nanom, oya sato a malikakaay, "imatini sato i,mangota aca kinian a namom, a maamaanen no mita ko nipiladom" sato. Mafiyor a mangota ko nanom O cofay(patiko) to nangra tayra ci mamaan, "icowa ko nanom" han to ni mama nangra, sowal sato koya malikakaay, "tahira han niyam itira i, mafinor koya piladoman, mangota ko nanom, orasaka caay kami pihacol mama" han to no wawa, ci mama sato nangra saowal saan: " ano matira aca katayra ho miliyaw a miladom, tingalaw to kiya" han to no mama. Miliyaw heca a patiko koya wawa a tatosa a miladom, tahira han nangra, matiya to a mangota kaiya nanom, micofay heca kiyan a malikakaay,tahira saan i pisakilangan " ira " han ni mama nagra a mitala, " nawi, matiya to mama a mafinor, o cayay kami kapiladom" han to no wawa ko sowal ci mamaan. Ya sato mama ci Topalocong itira to a mayoyang to," ano matira aca a mafinor,o iraay ko mikari'angay i fafa'ed kiya, o hada demaken aca namo a malikaka, kasihawan ato 'idoc a miladom, tahira han namo ano mafinor heca, kamo to i,dipdip han a pasifafaw ma'araw namo koya a mingotaay haw, ano o maan to kira a mari'angay, ano ira a ma'araw namo itira,aka pisamata ka o recafi' namo a mipatay, tangsol han a militangal haw" han to no mama."hayi" sato koya tatosaay a wawa. Patayen koya mingotaay tangsol litangalen han no mama Tatoy sato koya malikakaay to hawan ato 'idoc a lomowad a miladom. So'elinay tahira han to itira i sa'owac, sa matiya to a mangota, dipdip(hokhok) sato koya a malikakaay pasifafaw, so'elinay tangasa i safafaw koya a malikakaay mafinor to ko nanom. Iniaan aca koya mifinoray to nanom a tamdaw,"inian a tamdaw ko mingotaay" sato a mayoyang koya a malikakaay,tangsol han to nangra a micocok ato milofot, maherek sato a militangal koya a malikakaay tiri'en to nangra koya a tangal, " ci mama ita kini " macekok, ono mita a mama a tangal, nengneng han ko pising so'elinay ci mama ita kini sato cangra. Taraana to i pisakilangan sato koya malikakakaay i, so'elinay malaheci away itira ci mama nangra, o ci mama heca nangra kinian a malofotay o tangic to niya malikakaay," patay han nomita ci mama ita" ,sato cangra.hinam han i,ci mama taca nangra ko mingotaay tinian a nanom, sapisafa'naaw ni mama nangra to wawa, nona o mangalayay to aca to sakapatayaw kinian a mama. Tatoy han to noya malikakaay koya tangal a minokay. Tangasa sato i loma', " citafad kami ina" han to noya malikakaay ci ina nangra, " hamay pa'arawi kako" han to no ina, pa'araw sa o paci'eng, "caay, ka o pising ko pa'arawen" han to no ina.Pa'araaraw sa o kakotong no laway, "caay, ka o pising" han to no ina. Pa'araaraw sa o pilofotan, mayoyang to ko ina," ka o pising" ha kiya kiso, so'elinay pa'araw hanto to pising, iyaan sato o ina "ci mama namo kiraan" sato a mayoyang ato mangic a misaheto(tada o tangic to ni ina), " ano matira aca kamo, o pa'acaay ko nika saanan namo ci mamaan namo, ka o nikangayaw" (militnagl to sapatodong to mama) han to no ina a mayoyang, so'elinay o satokol (misaliway to sakakahemaw no tatirengan) to nangra a malikaka masaromi'ami'ad a mafakac(comikay) ato ma'efer. Papilitangalen no ina to sapatodong to mama Ma'edeng to kini sato cangra a malikaka, o lowad to nangra a mi'adop to ngafor, so'elinay midepdep to cangra kiaan ngafor, malepel to nangrankiyaan ngafor, alaen to nangra ko remes ato do'es a paini ci inaan nangra, sowal sato ci ina nangra, "caay hen kini ka o matatodongay kinian a ngafor, tiyola hen a mi'adop" han to ni ina. === Pacefaday tilid ===
S.PHON: == ɾaɾəŋatan no~u pisafao~uɾ == papiɾaɬ~ɮo~umən ni mama ko~u maɾakakaaj a faʡinajan itija ħo~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ʦa ɾo~una awaw aʦi to~upaɾo~uʦo~uŋ ħananaj,misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sakasaɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u sapisamiħəʦaan a ɾisin, so~uʡəɾinaj saʦiwawa sato~u ʦaŋra a mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ira ʦi majaw kakaɾawan ko~u kaka, saʦisafa saan ʦi o~unak kakaɾawan tato~usa a maɾikaka, maħatato~usa o~u faʡinajan. safaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sato~u ko~u mama naŋra a maɾikaka, "mikiɾaŋ ħo~u kita a maramamama" ħan no~u mama so~umo~uwaɾ ko~uja maɾikakaaj. so~uʡəɾinaj ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ sato~u a misakiɾaŋ ʦaŋra i ɾo~uto~uk no~u faɾaawaj. jo~u misakiɾaŋ ʦi mama, papiɾaɬ~ɮo~umən ni mama ʦa majaw aʦi o~unak a maɾikaka,jaan sato~u maɾikakaaj "mafo~ukiɾ kami mama to~u ɾaɾan a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um" ħan no~una wawa, o~u mama sato~u "ano~u matira aʦa, to~uɾikawən ħo~u ako~u ko~u ɾaɾan namo~u" ħan to~u no~u mama. o~uja mifariwan no~u mama a ɾaɾan .sapikəpikəɬ~ɮ sanaj, tama ħan no~u mama ko~u maraʡajaj a mipaɾaɾan,jo~u taŋasa i piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman a saʡo~uwaʦ, maħərək sato~u itira a mifariw a mipaɾaɾan, so~uwaɾ sato~u ʦi mama:"o~uriri to~u ɾaɬ~ɮo~umən to~u" ħan to~u ni mama ko~u wawa nira a tato~usa. "ħaji" sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj. taħiraħira i piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman i, ʡaraw ħan maŋo~uta ko~uja nano~um, o~uja sato~u a maɾikakaaj, "imatini sato~u i,maŋo~uta aʦa kinian a namo~um, a maamaanən no~u mita ko~u nipiɾaɬ~ɮo~um" sato~u. mafijo~ur a maŋo~uta ko~u nano~um o~u ʦo~ufaj(patiko~u) to~u naŋra tajra ʦi mamaan, "iʦo~uwa ko~u nano~um" ħan to~u ni mama naŋra, so~uwaɾ sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj, "taħira ħan nijam itira i, mafino~ur ko~uja piɾaɬ~ɮo~uman, maŋo~uta ko~u nano~um, o~urasaka ʦaaj kami piħaʦo~uɾ mama" ħan to~u no~u wawa, ʦi mama sato~u naŋra sao~uwaɾ saan: " ano~u matira aʦa katajra ħo~u miɾijaw a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, tiŋaɾaw to~u kija" ħan to~u no~u mama. miɾijaw ħəʦa a patiko~u ko~uja wawa a tato~usa a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, taħira ħan naŋra, matija to~u a maŋo~uta kaija nano~um, miʦo~ufaj ħəʦa kijan a maɾikakaaj,taħira saan i pisakiɾaŋan " ira " ħan ni mama na*ra a mitaɾa, " nawi, matija to~u mama a mafino~ur, o~u ʦajaj kami kapiɾaɬ~ɮo~um" ħan to~u no~u wawa ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦi mamaan. ja sato~u mama ʦi to~upaɾo~uʦo~uŋ itira to~u a majo~ujaŋ to~u," ano~u matira aʦa a mafino~ur,o~u iraaj ko~u mikariʡaŋaj i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ kija, o~u ħaɬ~ɮa ɬ~ɮəmakən aʦa namo~u a maɾikaka, kasiħawan ato~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, taħira ħan namo~u ano~u mafino~ur ħəʦa, kamo~u to~u i,ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮip ħan a pasifafaw maʡaraw namo~u ko~uja a miŋo~utaaj ħaw, ano~u o~u maan to~u kira a mariʡaŋaj, ano~u ira a maʡaraw namo~u itira,aka pisamata ka o~u rəʦafiʡ namo~u a mipataj, taŋso~uɾ ħan a miɾitaŋaɾ ħaw" ħan to~u no~u mama."ħaji" sato~u ko~uja tato~usaaj a wawa. patajən ko~uja miŋo~utaaj taŋso~uɾ ɾitaŋaɾən ħan no~u mama tato~uj sato~u ko~uja maɾikakaaj to~u ħawan ato~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um. so~uʡəɾinaj taħira ħan to~u itira i saʡo~uwaʦ, sa matija to~u a maŋo~uta, ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮip(ħo~ukħo~uk) sato~u ko~uja a maɾikakaaj pasifafaw, so~uʡəɾinaj taŋasa i safafaw ko~uja a maɾikakaaj mafino~ur to~u ko~u nano~um. iniaan aʦa ko~uja mifino~uraj to~u nano~um a tamɬ~ɮaw,"inian a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miŋo~utaaj" sato~u a majo~ujaŋ ko~uja a maɾikakaaj,taŋso~uɾ ħan to~u naŋra a miʦo~uʦo~uk ato~u miɾo~ufo~ut, maħərək sato~u a miɾitaŋaɾ ko~uja a maɾikakaaj tiriʡən to~u naŋra ko~uja a taŋaɾ, " ʦi mama ita kini " maʦəko~uk, o~uno~u mita a mama a taŋaɾ, nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u pisiŋ so~uʡəɾinaj ʦi mama ita kini sato~u ʦaŋra. taraana to~u i pisakiɾaŋan sato~u ko~uja maɾikakakaaj i, so~uʡəɾinaj maɾaħəʦi awaj itira ʦi mama naŋra, o~u ʦi mama ħəʦa naŋra kinian a maɾo~ufo~utaj o~u taŋiʦ to~u nija maɾikakaaj," pataj ħan no~umita ʦi mama ita" ,sato~u ʦaŋra.ħinam ħan i,ʦi mama taʦa naŋra ko~u miŋo~utaaj tinian a nano~um, sapisafaʡnaaw ni mama naŋra to~u wawa, no~una o~u maŋaɾajaj to~u aʦa to~u sakapatajaw kinian a mama. tato~uj ħan to~u no~uja maɾikakaaj ko~uja taŋaɾ a mino~ukaj. taŋasa sato~u i ɾo~umaʡ, " ʦitafaɬ~ɮ kami ina" ħan to~u no~uja maɾikakaaj ʦi ina naŋra, " ħamaj paʡarawi kako~u" ħan to~u no~u ina, paʡaraw sa o~u paʦiʡəŋ, "ʦaaj, ka o~u pisiŋ ko~u paʡarawən" ħan to~u no~u ina.paʡaraaraw sa o~u kako~uto~uŋ no~u ɾawaj, "ʦaaj, ka o~u pisiŋ" ħan to~u no~u ina. paʡaraaraw sa o~u piɾo~ufo~utan, majo~ujaŋ to~u ko~u ina," ka o~u pisiŋ" ħa kija kiso~u, so~uʡəɾinaj paʡaraw ħanto~u to~u pisiŋ, ijaan sato~u o~u ina "ʦi mama namo~u kiraan" sato~u a majo~ujaŋ ato~u maŋiʦ a misaħəto~u(taɬ~ɮa o~u taŋiʦ to~u ni ina), " ano~u matira aʦa kamo~u, o~u paʡaʦaaj ko~u nika saanan namo~u ʦi mamaan namo~u, ka o~u nikaŋajaw" (miɾitna*ɾ to~u sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u mama) ħan to~u no~u ina a majo~ujaŋ, so~uʡəɾinaj o~u sato~uko~uɾ (misaɾiwaj to~u sakakaħəmaw no~u tatirəŋan) to~u naŋra a maɾikaka masaro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ a mafakaʦ(ʦo~umikaj) ato~u maʡəfər. papiɾitaŋaɾən no~u ina to~u sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u mama maʡəɬ~ɮəŋ to~u kini sato~u ʦaŋra a maɾikaka, o~u ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u naŋra a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up to~u ŋafo~ur, so~uʡəɾinaj miɬ~ɮəpɬ~ɮəp to~u ʦaŋra kiaan ŋafo~ur, maɾəpəɾ to~u naŋrankijaan ŋafo~ur, aɾaən to~u naŋra ko~u rəməs ato~u ɬ~ɮo~uʡəs a paini ʦi inaan naŋra, so~uwaɾ sato~u ʦi ina naŋra, "ʦaaj ħən kini ka o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kinian a ŋafo~ur, tijo~uɾa ħən a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up" ħan to~u ni ina. === paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ ===
